subcodes.first_line: The missive of thy eminence reached the Throne, was illumined by the lights of the Kingdom and attained unto the honor of utterance. Praise be unto the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب آنجناب لدی العرش حاضر و بانوار ملکوت مشاهده و بیان فائز حمد محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
